title: Missing WashU student identified
summary_en: On May 18, the St. Louis Metropolitan Police Department (SLMPD) confirmed the identity of a body recovered from the Mississippi River last week as missing student Antonio Arellano-Banda. He was 20.
author: Lewis Rand

title: Q&A: Andy Cohen talks Blueberry Hill, post-graduate life, and celebrity worship
summary_en: After his speech at Friday’s commencement ceremony, Andy Cohen sat down for an interview with Student Life reporter Zach Trabitz. The following Q&A has been edited for length and clarity.
author: Zach Trabitz
title_cn: Q&A: Andy Cohen talks Blueberry Hill, post-graduate life, and celebrity worship
